title: Orientation page
description: A jurisdiction's plain-English orientation page (site structure item #1): who regulates what, the live regimes, the incoming ones. Lives at content/{jurisdiction_id}/orientation.json since the registry-model pivot -- a straight rename of the file formerly at content/start_here.json (schema formerly start_here.json), shape unchanged. Regenerated by the analyst whenever pillar states change materially; 'body' is plain prose (Markdown-compatible paragraphs), not structured data, since this page is a written orientation, not a data record.
